node.description:
__Class:__ Mage
__Relative(s):__ [Park Kyung-Hye](https://anilist.co/character/209396/KyungHye-Park) (Mother), [Sung Jin-Ah](https://anilist.co/character/138791/JinAh-Sung) (Sister), ~![Sung Il-Hwan](https://anilist.co/character/138790/IlHwan-Sung) (Father), [Cha Hae-In](https://anilist.co/character/138789/HaeIn-Cha) (Wife), [Sung Su-Ho](https://anilist.co/character/306654/Suho-Sung) (Son), [Yoo Jin-Ho](https://anilist.co/character/136076/JinHo-Yoo) (Brother in Law)!~ 
~!__Guild:__ Ahjin Guild (Guild Master)
__Affiliation:__ Korean Hunters Association (helper), White Tiger Guild (helper), Hunters Guild (helper), Knights Guild (helper), Ahjin Guild (Guild Master)!~

Seong Jin-U is the protagonist of [Solo Leveling](https://anilist.co/manga/105398/Solo-Leveling/) and is known as an infamously weak E-Rank Hunter. He is a humble and benevolent individual who cares deeply for his family and has an ardent desire to become stronger. As a result, he shares a close relationship with his sister and his mother, and rarely wastes an opportunity to refine his skills and gain more power.

~!He becomes an S-Rank hunter after being given a chance to become stronger by the System.!~
He is a S rank hunter and master of the White Tiger guild.

__Magic Type:__ Fire

Korean C-Rank Hunter and kumdo teacher. He is also one of Jinwoo's old friends, having known him since he was a E-Rank Hunter.
Son Ki-Hoon (손기훈) is the Team Leader of Attack Force B of the Hunters Guild.
She is a healer with rank B.
Go Gun-Hee (고건희) is a South Korean S-Rank Hunter and the Chairman of the Korean Hunters Association.
Sangmin Ahn is the chief of the White Tiger Guild's 2nd Division Management Department.

Statue of God is the hidden boss of the Double Dungeon. It is first introduced during the D-Rank Dungeon Arc as Jin-Woo and other hunters entered the Cartenon Temple unaware of the dangers that were present inside.
Laura is the secretary of Scavenger Guild, the strongest guild in the USA. She is a composed individual who rarely ever shows any emotion.
Kichul Hyun is the deputy manager of the White Tiger Guild's 2nd Division Management Department and Sangimn Ahn's assistant.
A shadow Sung Jin-Woo gained after entering the Red Gate. ~!Before being reawakened as a Shadow he was Chul Kim (김철), an A-Rank Hunter of the White Tiger Guild.!~
An A rank hunter that works for Hunter's association of Korea.

Min Byung-Gu was a retired hunter and one of the 10 S-Rank and only S-Rank Healer of South Korea. He was a close friend with the White Tiger's Guild Master Baek Yoon-Ho. He took part in the 4th Jeju Island Reclamation Raid and was a member of the Korean Raid Team tasked with killing the boss of the Jeju Island Gate.
Park Hee-Jin (박희진) is a member of White Tiger Guild that Sung Jin-Woo helped when they got stuck inside the Red Gate.
Hwang Dongsuk is a C-rank Hunter and the older brother of [Dong-Su Hwang](https://anilist.co/character/136075/DongSu-Hwang).
